flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Indianapolis fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0k → 3.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at University of Indianapolis vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.1k vs 4.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Indianapolis fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (51.1% → 44.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Indianapolis fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (63.5% → 55.8%).
